race.comment: TWO UP BOOM (3) got a long way back first-up but was solid late when only 2.2L off the winner in a stronger race. The form out of that race has been franked already and the blinkers go on for the first time. Back to a maiden now is a big tick and he can land the knockout blow. SUPER SENTAI (5) is on resumption today on the back of a winning trial at Belmont earlier this month. Chris Parnham's booking is a good push for his chances and with his upside, he can make a statement. CHATTAHOOCHIE (8) had plenty of support on debut when bumping into a smart one at this track. She hasn't taken a backward step judging by her latest trial and she can go one better this time around. PERFUME PRINCESS (12) is a handy type on resumption and can't be left out of calculations. THREESPIRIT (11) showed enough in her only trial to suggest that she can feature in the finish on debut.
